priorities.label: S45 P4 — Implement Sym A (joiner interaction)
priorities.check_method: controls.ts onUp LMB: isClient detection via world.gameMode === '1v1' && !world.isHost; in client mode bypass reach + zone gates, use cursor (not host-authoritative spark.pos) as targetRefPos for pickPrimitiveInRange + allPrimitivesInRange + redundantBondTargetsInSameComponent. sparkLifecycle.ts applyPickupSpark: REMOTE-carrier gated snap (world.gameMode === '1v1' && action.playerId !== world.localPlayerId) sets spark.pos + prevPos = next.avatarPos; LOCAL carriers preserve pre-S45 prevPos-snap-to-pos byte-identical (avoids breaking 754-test suite where tests don't pre-set avatarPos). gameMode.ts applyUpdateAvatarPos: unconditional carry-coupling — when player.kind === 'Carrying', sync the carried spark.pos + prevPos to avatarPos. Combined: joiner's pickup-time spark.pos snaps to joiner.avatarPos (captures cursor intent), and subsequent 10Hz UPDATE_AVATAR_POS dispatches keep spark.pos tracking. Tests: existing sparkLifecycle.test happy-path preserved via remote-carrier gating; new test 'S45 Sym A — REMOTE carrier teleports to avatarPos' exercises the snap path with 1v1+isHost+P2 setup.

priorities.label: S45 P5 — Implement Sym B (multi-avatar + UPDATE_AVATAR_POS dispatch wiring)
priorities.check_method: avatarRenderer.ts rewritten: drops single-player ctor arg; constructor takes only Application. sync(world, controls) iterates world.players + maintains one Graphics per player keyed by PlayerId. Hybrid sourcing per Battle Ledger C3 — local player (id === controls.getPlayerId()) reads controls.cursor for lag-free position; remote players read world.players[id].avatarPos. Per-frame computeAvatarAlphas pulse with C10 ADOPT-LITE boost (AVATAR_PULSE_DEPTH * 2.0) when controls.state.kind === 'AttractDrag' on local — perceptual-lag bridge via existing FSM state with zero new mechanism. GC sweep removes Graphics for departed players (RETURN_TO_TITLE drops P2). main.ts:228 instantiation updated to new AvatarRenderer(app) (no player arg). main.ts ticker callback closure-scope state vars (AVATAR_POS_DISPATCH_MIN_INTERVAL_MS=100, AVATAR_POS_DISPATCH_MIN_DELTA_PX=2, lastAvatarPosDispatchMs, lastDispatchedCursorX/Y); in-ticker dispatch block gated on world.gameState === 'PLAYING' && world.gameMode === '1v1' calls dispatchFn UPDATE_AVATAR_POS with throttle + delta-skip semantics. Both host (local dispatch) and joiner (INTENT over network) send at 10Hz.

priorities.label: S45 P6 — Implement Sym C(a) (carry-spark tint)
priorities.check_method: renderer.ts SparkRenderer.sync signature extended: sync(freeSparks: readonly Spark[], world?: World) — world optional for back-compat with existing test callers. Per-frame tint resolution: if s.state.kind === 'Carried' AND world provided, sprite.tint = carrier.color (lookup via world.players.get(s.state.carrierId)), alpha boosted 0.92→1.0 (CARRIED_SPARK_ALPHA) so carry visually stands out. Defensive FREE_SPARK_TINT fallback when carrier missing (Battle Ledger C4 — transient race on joiner during RETURN_TO_TITLE-while-carrying). Free-state behavior byte-identical to pre-S45 (FREE_SPARK_TINT 0xe6e6f0, FREE_SPARK_ALPHA 0.92). main.ts:940 sparkRenderer.sync call updated to pass world. DEFER Sym C(b/c) primitive/creature creator-tint to follow-up PDR per Council Battle Ledger lock + Runtime-Verifiability regression-compounding rule.
